payload.summary_zh: GEOFlow 2.1.1 修复结构化数据注入、受管图片文件边界、出站请求 SSRF 与管理权限问题，并关闭可执行主题在线编辑，加入隔离预览、package-only 交付和只读安全审计。
payload.summary_en: GEOFlow 2.1.1 fixes structured-data injection, managed image file-boundary, outbound SSRF, and admin authorization issues; it also disables executable live theme editing and adds isolated previews, package-only delivery, and a read-only security audit.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级时先保持图片删除门禁关闭并停机排空旧进程，设置一次性确认后执行 php artisan migrate；启动新代码，运行 php artisan geoflow:managed-images:readiness 与 php artisan geoflow:security-audit，确认就绪后再启用图片删除门禁并重启 queue worker。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: Keep the managed image deletion gate disabled, drain old processes, set the one-time confirmation, and run php artisan migrate. Start the new code, run php artisan geoflow:managed-images:readiness and php artisan geoflow:security-audit, then enable deletion only after readiness is confirmed and restart queue workers.
